summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Business Intelligence features for ASR Enterprises Solar CRM. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 8 BI features verified working - Daily Digest, Leaderboard, Revenue Dashboard, Lead Analytics, Overdue Alerts, AI Insights, Commissions, and Business Intelligence link in CRM header.
critical_code_review_comments: All Business Intelligence features are implemented correctly and working as expected
AI Daily Tips use fallback random tips when LLM fails (documented MOCKED behavior)
All 8 new BI endpoints return proper data structures
Business Intelligence link correctly styled with gradient and visible in CRM header
seed_data_creation: Used existing test leads from previous iterations for BI analytics testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 Business Intelligence features verified working. Backend endpoints tested: /api/crm/leaderboard, /api/crm/revenue-dashboard, /api/crm/set-target, /api/crm/lead-analytics, /api/crm/overdue-leads, /api/crm/leads/{id}/timeline, /api/crm/commissions, /api/crm/daily-digest, /api/crm/insights. Frontend tabs all navigate correctly and display data.

staff_performance_leaderboard.details: Returns staff rankings with performance scores, conversions, revenue. Shows podium view for top 3.

revenue_dashboard.details: Shows monthly revenue, target progress, pipeline value (₹1,470,000), revenue by payment type.

set_monthly_target.ui_element: Set Target input and button in Revenue tab
set_monthly_target.details: Successfully sets monthly revenue target, verified update in dashboard.

lead_analytics.ui_tab: Lead Analytics tab in Business Dashboard
lead_analytics.details: Shows total leads, conversion funnel (7 total → 1 contacted → 0 surveyed → 0 quoted → 0 won), top districts, avg lead score 79.3.

overdue_lead_alerts.ui_tab: Overdue Alerts tab in Business Dashboard
overdue_lead_alerts.details: Categories: Critical (5+ days), 72h, 48h, 24h. Shows 'All leads are up to date!' when no overdue.

customer_journey_timeline.details: Returns timeline events (lead_created, activities, followups, payments) for a lead. Returns 404 for invalid lead ID.

commission_calculator.details: Calculates staff commissions: Sales 2%, Survey ₹500/survey, Installation 1%, Manager 0.5%. Shows total commission payable.

daily_business_digest.ui_tab: Daily Digest tab (default) in Business Dashboard
daily_business_digest.details: Shows greeting, date, AI tip (MOCKED - random fallback), new leads, revenue, followups, hot leads.

smart_business_insights.ui_tab: AI Insights tab in Business Dashboard
smart_business_insights.details: Returns AI-powered insights: conversion rate warning/success, top district, best source, avg deal value, top performer.

business_intelligence_link.details: Orange-pink gradient button visible in CRM Dashboard header. Navigates to /admin/business-dashboard.

mocked_apis.ai_daily_tips: Uses random fallback tips when LLM call fails (e.g., 'Follow up on Saturdays...')
mocked_apis.admin_otp: OTP 131993 works as fallback when RESEND_API_KEY not configured

business_dashboard_page.header: Business Intelligence - ASR Enterprises Performance Dashboard
